name: Dinner Mate
overview: It tells a story that how two young women become close friends by having dinners together. They happened to be arranged seated at the same table one time they went to eat out alone. At that time, they were both bothered by relationships, and from the first accidental dinner together, multiple dinners then followed, over which they open up to each other their relationship troubles, get closer and develop an unusual friendship.

trailers.title: Teaser:Song Seung Heon & Seo Ji-Hye's quarrelsome love will come~| Dinner Mate 一起吃晚餐吗 | iQIYI
